mnemonics.title: SMA
mnemonics.content: The three operations in order: **S**wap, **M**ultiply, **A**dd. This is the order they are often listed in.

mnemonics.title: K ≠ 0
mnemonics.content: Remember the crucial rule for the scaling operation: the scalar (k) must NOT be zero. Multiplying by zero destroys the row and is not reversible.

mnemonics.title: Undo with the Opposite
mnemonics.content: To remember the inverse operations: For Scaling, undo with the reciprocal (1/k). For Adding, undo with the opposite sign (-k). For Swapping, undo with itself.
